field.name: tk_lkvv
field.check: tk_lkvv not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'AccumulationAccount', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @r int select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end create index i on @@table (tk_lkvv) -- Checking &Checking; if @type = '0' delete @@table where tk_lkvv in (select tk_lkvv from dmtklkvv) select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmtklkvv b on a.tk_lkvv = b.tk_lkvv delete @@table where tk_lkvv in (select tk_lkvv from #k) -- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
